title: Mighty Crunchy Kenyan Scallion Skewers
description: A herbal and crunchy Kenyan dish featuring scallions, this recipe is perfect for a low-sodium and energizing snack. It combines the freshness of scallions with the crunch of toasted nuts and seeds.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic powder, and salt-free seasoning blend.
Add chopped scallions to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread marinated scallions onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Sprinkle sliced almonds and toasted pumpkin seeds over the scallions.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 12 minutes, or until the scallions are tender and the nuts are crispy.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
